description: A bank uses an AI model to automatically decide whether to approve or reject mortgage loan applications based on applicant financial data and credit history.
notes: Creditworthiness assessment for natural persons — Annex III point 5(b). Human oversight obligation applies.

description: A municipality deploys cameras with real-time facial recognition in a public square to identify suspects in an ongoing criminal investigation.
notes: Real-time remote biometric identification in publicly accessible spaces. Law enforcement exception in Article 5(2) may apply but is narrow.

description: An e-commerce platform uses AI to recommend products to users based on their browsing history.
notes: Standard recommendation system. No specific AI Act obligations. GDPR applies separately.

description: An HR software company offers a tool that scores and ranks job candidates' CVs before a human recruiter reviews the shortlist.
notes: Recruitment and CV screening — Annex III point 4(a). The human review at the end does not remove the high-risk classification.

description: A customer service chatbot for a telecom company that answers billing questions and troubleshoots connectivity issues.
notes: Transparency obligation: users must be informed they are interacting with an AI.

description: A school uses AI to generate personalised study plans based on each student's test scores and learning pace.
notes: AI in educational or vocational training that determines access to education or evaluates learning outcomes.

description: A tool that generates synthetic images of products for e-commerce listings using generative AI.
notes: Product image generation. Article 50(4) on deepfake labelling may apply only if the images could be mistaken for authentic photos in a misleading context.

description: An immigration authority uses AI to assess the risk level of visa applicants and flag those for manual review.
notes: Migration, asylum and border control — Annex III point 7. Affects fundamental rights.
